metadata.description: Your team of superheroes, powered by superpowers — Claude Code plugins that team up to run largely-autonomous development.

plugins.name: the-architect
plugins.description: Turns a fuzzy idea into a reviewed spec → plan → tasks — the requirements-first front half of the loop.

plugins.name: review-crew
plugins.description: Multi-agent code, plan, and tech-debt review, calibrated per-project.

plugins.name: test-pilot
plugins.description: Seeded manual test plans on PRs plus autonomous browser execution before human spot-check.

plugins.name: workhorse
plugins.description: The per-issue back-half producer: approved tasks → a CI-green, ready-for-review PR + live dev server, with a non-bypassable never-merge floor.
